---
title: "HW5"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

## California Wind Turbines Map

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(maps)

# Load map data
states <- map_data("state")

# Filter California
california <- states %>% filter(region == "california")

# Load turbines
load("/Users/rodger.lutalo/Desktop/DSC 502 - Bisign/HW/HW 5/wind_turbines.rda")

# Filter CA turbines
wind_ca <- wind_turbines %>% filter(t_state == "CA")

# Plot
ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = california,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "lightblue",
               color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = wind_ca,
             aes(x = xlong, y = ylat),
             color = "red", size = 1) +
  guides(fill = "none")
